title: Enchantment Level Patch
description: Swaps the enchantment level numbers with enchantment symbols. (10, 11, 255 to X, XI, CCLV)
body:
**Swaps the enchantment level numbers with enchantment symbols. (III, IV, V ,VI)**
 
 Made With MCreator


_~~----------------------------------------------------------------------------~~_


For Example:


_**Without Mod/Patch**_




![Without Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/423ee28fde4e11c919fabef24d53834b6a3e211f.png)






_**With Mod/Patch**_



![With Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00bf8ad96504677234fe5e74e8f29b71aab66ea9.png)

    
```
Sharpness.Enchantment.Level: "255" = Sharpness CCLV
```

Fun Fact: The Enchantment Level Symbols is actually Roman Numerals.
